{{Infobox technique
| name = Star's Edge
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Star's Edge]] is an [[Enforcer technique]] in the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] that reinforces a weapon.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Star]]’s Edge is a technique used by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Star's Edge]] technique sharpens a user's hand with bright white [[sword]]-and-light madra.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
